field.label: IPv4 WG Gateway
field.help: Select the IPv4 WireGuard gateway. The IPv6 addresses will be auto-detected from the WireGuard tunnel configuration.

field.label: IPv6 Gateway Address
field.help: IPv6 next-hop address for routing (auto-derived from tunnel config).

field.label: IPv6 Interface Address
field.help: IPv6 address assigned to the WG interface (auto-derived from tunnel config).
